body: The leaderboard code assumes that all the variables defined in `get_sim_var_dict()` are in the diagnostics, but this isn't always the case, especially with calibration. Hence, this PR only adds the variables if they exist in the diagnostics. Furthermore, this PR clean up the leaderboard code a bit using the new features in ClimaAnalysis.
title: Update leaderboard code for use in calibration

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Currently, running AMIP + diag EDMF with integrated land fails right after initialization. I think this is because `ustar` is zero everywhere, due to zero momentum fluxes (when I compare to a run with the bucket, this is the main difference I see). 

Passing build: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/6529#0196cb72-bca3-44e2-9fb6-9e8c9550a21b

## Content
- [x] take max(uv, gustiness) in ustar computation
- [x] avoid divide by 0 buoyancy flux in L_MO computation
- [x] add AMIP + diag EDMF shortruns with bucket, integrated land to CI

title: make integrated land compatible with diag EDMF
